title: How We Unlock Transformative Growth and ROI With Data 360 and Agentforce
author: Rahul Auradkar, Erika Ehrli

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Every business leader today grapples with the same challenge: how to truly understand your customers and empower your teams when critical data is trapped across disparate systems, preventing a complete, real-time view. You know the frustration – customer insights are fragmented, sales forecasts feel like guesswork. Marketing efforts miss the mark, and your service representatives are constantly hunting for information. This isn’t just an IT problem; it directly impacts your bottom line and the experience you deliver. At Salesforce, we faced this exact reality. With decades of growth and numerous acquisitions, our own customer data was spread across various systems. We recognized that to truly deliver on the promise of AI and serve our customers effectively, we first had to solve this fundamental challenge for ourselves. We became our own “Customer Zero,” demonstrating firsthand the power of our solutions by building a unified data foundation with Salesforce Data 360. The payoff has been undeniable, driving significant ROI across our business: We’ve identified$23 million in potential revenuefrom customer license renewals, and we cannow automatically notifyour sales teams about these opportunities using AI-powered Slack notifications.60% increase in marketing lead revenue and contract value per lead.85% resolution rate with Agentforcesupporting millions of conversations.98,000 fewer support casesprojected in the first half of 2025 compared to the same period last year. This wasn’t a theoretical exercise; it was a rigorous test to demonstrate the tangible business value of our own AI and Data technology. Our “Customer Zero” strategy is the ultimate litmus test for product viability and a core tenet of our promise to customers. As our Chairman and CEO, Marc Benioff, has often said: if our business isn’t running on our own technology, we have no right to sell it to others. Our challenge: From data chaos to a unified source of truthThe solution: Data 360 – the central nervous system for unified experiencesKey elements of our Data 360 implementationThe payoff: Multi-faceted ROI across our businessLessons from the trenchesLooking ahead: The rise of the agentic enterprise

sections.heading: Our challenge: From data chaos to a unified source of truth
sections.text: Four years ago, managing customer data at Salesforce was a vastly different landscape. Information poured in from various sources, including multiple Salesforce CRM instances, external data systems like Snowflake, Google, and Amazon. This fragmentation meant our sales, service, and marketing teams, and nascent AI efforts, lacked the cohesive, real-time context needed to truly excel. Our internal processes were slower, and getting a complete customer picture felt impossible. Our goal was clear: to forge a single source of truth—what we call the “Truth Profile.” This vision demanded a real-time, 360-degree view of each customer, unifying every interaction, signal, and data point across all systems. It’s the essential brain that empowers every human team and Agentforce to act with unparalleled context, confidence, and trust. (Back to top)

sections.heading: The solution: Data 360 – the central nervous system for unified experiences
sections.text: Data 360became the central hub that stitches all of these disparate systems together. With its vast library of connectors and APIs, Data 360 enabled us to ingest and harmonize information from virtually any business application. This included data from across Salesforce clouds like Sales, Service, Marketing, and Commerce, as well as marketing and advertising platforms, ERP and financial systems, data warehouses, lakes, and databases. We even pulled in real-time conversations from Slack and Agentforce. This unification created the comprehensive, 360-degree customer view that is essential to power more intelligent sales, service, marketing, and the sophisticated AI experiences our customers expect. Data 360 enables Salesforce customer teams and Agentforce to act from a single source of truth, harmonizing 266 million fragmented profiles from 650+ data streams into 141 million unique individuals with a 360-degree view of all of their engagements. This single, golden record eliminates duplicates and provides a consistent understanding.Unified signals:We captured real-time customer interest and intent from every touchpoint—product usage, web visits, email opens, event attendance, and more—by connecting data from Salesforce apps and usingZero Copy integrationswith partners likeSnowflakeandGoogle. This allows for dynamic, immediate responsiveness.Unified knowledge:We fed ourAgentforcewith a comprehensive knowledge base from over 5,000 records across Trailhead, service articles, and product descriptions. These elements now power everything we do, from hyper-personalized marketing campaigns to the AI-driven agents that support our sales and service teams. This deep data integration allows Agentforceto understand context and nuance that stand-alone AI solutions might miss, truly enabling intelligent, agentic action. (Back to top)

This is the power of using our own products to enhance our customer and employee experiences: Sales:We identified$25M in potential valuethrough an AI-powered Slack notifications pilot. By leveragingData 360for smarter audience segmentation and optimized campaign delivery, we also achieved a5X return on advertising spend.Service & Agentforce:WithAgentforcesupporting millions of conversations, we achieved an impressive85% resolution rate, showcasing the incredible efficiency and effectiveness of Agentforce. These results are a testament to the power of a truly unified data foundation, enabling us to deliver superior experiences and drive tangible business outcomes. (Back to top)

sections.heading: Looking ahead: The rise of the agentic enterprise

existing_ctas.heading: Data 360 + automation = ROI
existing_ctas.body: In this behind-the-scenes webinar, you’ll learn how Salesforce used Data 360 to unlock the value of more than 264 million profiles and over 40 billion signals to personalize every touchpoint.

raw_html:
Every business leader today grapples with the same challenge: how to truly understand your customers and empower your teams when critical data is trapped across disparate systems, preventing a complete, real-time view. You know the frustration – customer insights are fragmented, sales forecasts feel like guesswork. Marketing efforts miss the mark, and your service representatives are constantly hunting for information. This isn’t just an IT problem; it directly impacts your bottom line and the experience you deliver.

At Salesforce, we faced this exact reality. With decades of growth and numerous acquisitions, our own customer data was spread across various systems. We recognized that to truly deliver on the promise of AI and serve our customers effectively, we first had to solve this fundamental challenge for ourselves. We became our own “Customer Zero,” demonstrating firsthand the power of our solutions by building a unified data foundation with Salesforce Data 360.

The payoff has been undeniable, driving significant ROI across our business:

  • We’ve identified $23 million in potential revenue from customer license renewals, and we can now automatically notify our sales teams about these opportunities using AI-powered Slack notifications.
  • 60% increase in marketing lead revenue and contract value per lead.
  • 85% resolution rate with Agentforce supporting millions of conversations.
  • 98,000 fewer support cases projected in the first half of 2025 compared to the same period last year.

This wasn’t a theoretical exercise; it was a rigorous test to demonstrate the tangible business value of our own AI and Data technology. Our “Customer Zero” strategy is the ultimate litmus test for product viability and a core tenet of our promise to customers. As our Chairman and CEO, Marc Benioff, has often said: if our business isn’t running on our own technology, we have no right to sell it to others.

What we’ll cover

  • Our challenge: From data chaos to a unified source of truth
  • The solution: Data 360 – the central nervous system for unified experiences
  • Key elements of our Data 360 implementation
  • The payoff: Multi-faceted ROI across our business
  • Lessons from the trenches
  • Looking ahead: The rise of the agentic enterprise

Our challenge: From data chaos to a unified source of truth

Four years ago, managing customer data at Salesforce was a vastly different landscape. Information poured in from various sources, including multiple Salesforce CRM instances, external data systems like Snowflake, Google, and Amazon. This fragmentation meant our sales, service, and marketing teams, and nascent AI efforts, lacked the cohesive, real-time context needed to truly excel. Our internal processes were slower, and getting a complete customer picture felt impossible.

Our goal was clear: to forge a single source of truth—what we call the “Truth Profile.” This vision demanded a real-time, 360-degree view of each customer, unifying every interaction, signal, and data point across all systems. It’s the essential brain that empowers every human team and Agentforce to act with unparalleled context, confidence, and trust.

(Back to top)

The solution: Data 360 – the central nervous system for unified experiences

Data 360 became the central hub that stitches all of these disparate systems together. With its vast library of connectors and APIs, Data 360 enabled us to ingest and harmonize information from virtually any business application.  This included data from across Salesforce clouds like Sales, Service, Marketing, and Commerce, as well as marketing and advertising platforms, ERP and financial systems, data warehouses, lakes, and databases. We even pulled in real-time conversations from Slack and Agentforce.  This unification created the comprehensive, 360-degree customer view that is essential to power more intelligent sales, service, marketing, and the sophisticated AI experiences our customers expect.

(Back to top)

Key elements of our Data 360 implementation

We rebuilt our data foundation in Data 360 by focusing on three key elements:

  • Unified profiles: We merged 266 million disconnected profiles from systems like Sales Cloud, Marketing Cloud, LinkedIn, and Trailhead into 141 million unified views of our customers. This single, golden record eliminates duplicates and provides a consistent understanding.
  • Unified signals: We captured real-time customer interest and intent from every touchpoint—product usage, web visits, email opens, event attendance, and more—by connecting data from Salesforce apps and using Zero Copy integrations with partners like Snowflake and Google. This allows for dynamic, immediate responsiveness.
  • Unified knowledge: We fed our Agentforce with a comprehensive knowledge base from over 5,000 records across Trailhead, service articles, and product descriptions. This ensures our Agentforce has the precise, real-time information and context to resolve issues, answer questions, and even take proactive actions, enhancing every customer interaction.

These elements now power everything we do, from hyper-personalized marketing campaigns to the AI-driven agents that support our sales and service teams. This deep data integration allows Agentforce to understand context and nuance that stand-alone AI solutions might miss, truly enabling intelligent, agentic action.

(Back to top)

The payoff: Multi-faceted ROI across our business

By unifying our apps, data, and agents through this connected framework, we’ve unlocked significant, measurable growth and efficiency across our entire business. This is the power of using our own products to enhance our customer and employee experiences:

  • Sales: We identified $25M in potential value through an AI-powered Slack notifications pilot. This brought critical insights directly into the flow of work for our sales teams, also contributing to a 40% improvement in sales pipeline per lead by enabling more targeted and intelligent lead nurturing.
  • Marketing: Our unified data fueled a 60% increase in marketing lead revenue and contract value per lead. By leveraging Data 360 for smarter audience segmentation and optimized campaign delivery, we also achieved a 5X return on advertising spend.
  • Service & Agentforce: With Agentforce supporting millions of conversations, we achieved an impressive 85% resolution rate, showcasing the incredible efficiency and effectiveness of Agentforce. This automation directly led to 35,000 customer service hours saved annually, freeing our human service representatives to focus on more complex, empathetic interactions.

These results are a testament to the power of a truly unified data foundation, enabling us to deliver superior experiences and drive tangible business outcomes.

(Back to top)

Lessons from the trenches

Our journey taught us invaluable lessons that we now share with our customers:

  • Treat data as a product: Assign clear ownership and accountability to ensure data creates maximum value.
  • Start small, win big: Target high-impact use cases first instead of trying to “boil the ocean.” Demonstrate quick wins to build momentum.
  • Focus on quality, not quantity: Identify the most critical data signals to drive actionable insights, rather than just collecting everything.

Looking ahead: The rise of the agentic enterprise

This internal use of Agentforce, powered by contextual data, ensures our employees are operating with the same cutting-edge intelligence we offer our customers, elevating the customer experience we deliver. This is how we’ve scaled our blueprint across the entire organization, building an agentic enterprise where AI is deeply embedded in the flow of work to augment employees and delight customers. Data 360 is the key that unlocks the full potential of our data, our people, and our AI, making every interaction more intelligent and every action more impactful.

Ready to start your journey and unlock similar results? We invite you to explore our resources and connect with fellow Trailblazers.

  • Learn more about Salesforce Data 360
  • Watch the Salesforce on Salesforce video series
  • Join our Datablazer Community

Data 360 + automation = ROI

In this behind-the-scenes webinar, you’ll learn how Salesforce used Data 360 to unlock the value of more than 264 million profiles and over 40 billion signals to personalize every touchpoint.

Watch now

(Back to top)
